--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local n={"\085\071\071\054\099\054\061\061";"\100\066\119\090\074\089\051\108\105\118\106\097\074\057\061\061","\098\099\118\097\113\114\068\088\082\074\055\082\119\082\071\061";"\074\118\088\098\100\078\099\061","\103\081\052\110";"\112\052\048\073\070\117\119\065\074\122\106\122\105\104\076\101\055\047\061\061";"\071\057\120\078\105\054\061\061";"\078\052\104\108","\107\090\105\113\108\048\108\061";"\075\076\081\097","\105\111\052\108\100\043\052\108\068\116\070\090\068\118\088\106","\074\118\106\049\070\066\122\043";"\082\089\048\118\069\047\061\061";"\102\071\061\061","\068\109\106\108\074\047\061\061";"\074\111\122\090\112\066\051\048","\105\078\070\073\056\043\069\109","\112\066\119\097\112\043\122\082\074\116\099\061";"\078\081\074\086","\087\104\116\076","\074\111\120\080\074\047\061\061","\070\111\052\108\070\066\052\104\068\111\052\097\074\066\120\097\112\089\055\061";"\052\066\120\080\105\066\052\073\099\077\070\106\112\066\052\084\112\066\052\117\099\047\061\061";"\107\109\106\108\056\103\052\084\052\103\122\055\100\075\120\087\068\106\099\061","\050\108\043\101\065\110\120\114\121\082\079\079\085\081\107\074\065\071\061\061";"\081\116\070\070\043\103\047\073\055\077\110\104\107\066\070\055";"\102\082\071\106\074\101\048\049\102\071\061\061","\112\111\119\073\056\078\051\057\068\043\051\106","\074\116\067\073\100\078\099\061","\100\066\052\097","\047\109\052\108\112\066\119\097";"\116\051\102\066\085\098\074\101\098\048\068\061","\070\066\052\104\112\089\067\098\081\047\061\061";"\105\106\049\104\056\066\080\109\100\052\090\087\105\103\108\122\074\106\103\061","\070\111\052\108\103\111\052\073\112\118\106\084\074\047\061\061","\102\107\074\070\103\052\051\056\103\122\055\078\107\118\108\078\105\109\048\061","\106\066\074\049\113\085\057\067\055\122\117\061","\112\043\069\057\068\043\051\083";"\085\077\088\114\070\107\051\074\056\107\074\109\085\078\049\104";"\113\098\071\065","\114\114\083\085\055\103\068\114\121\097\122\079\122\085\081\068\097\100\104\074\111 return(function(n,w,T,S,g,I,J,M,p,L,u,f,j,U,A,v,N,F,B,x,O)M,j,O,v,F,x,B,f,L,U,A,N,p,u={},function(j,T,S,g)local n6,K,q,h,W,b,o,p,y,t,E,X,Q,V,d,U,R,C,J,m,s,P,L,G,H,i,Z,Y,F,e,f,a,l,z,c,r,D while j do if
